name: Aphid
description: A tiny harmless bug found across much of the park surface. It remains one of the simplest food sources in the opening hours and one of the most basic pieces of background life in the world.
behavior: It wanders without a clear route, pecks at ground resources, and sometimes drops aphid honeydew. Most of its life is built around finding food and fleeing from anything that feels even remotely dangerous.
interactionWithPlayer: It fears the player and flees on sight. If you want an easy kill, it is usually better to cut off its route than to chase blindly while it chains short hops away from you.
interactionWithCreatures: Plenty of small predators chase it, so almost every interaction ends in flight. It controls nothing; it just survives long enough to keep serving as food for something else.
strategy: Its only real defense is speed. If you want it for food, get close before it notices you or wait for the brief pause it often leaves after the first escape burst.
specialTraits: Can be tamed with Plant Slurry.
Exclusive stealing can grant a Speed Droplet.

lootTransformations.description: If the creature is killed with spicy damage or a verified heat effect, compatible meat can become cooked meat.
If the creature is killed with salty damage, compatible meat can become jerky.
